items.title_en: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫发现失踪意大利潜水员尸体
items.desc_en: The bodies of all five Italian divers who died in the Maldives last week have now been found, officials tell the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 官员告诉英国广播公司，上周在马尔代夫死亡的五名意大利潜水员的尸体现已全部找到。

items.title_en: Berkshire has revamped its portfolio — here's how the new stocks are trading
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔修改了其投资组合——新股票的交易方式如下
items.desc_en: Berkshire Hathaway took a $2.6 billion stake in Delta Airlines and increased its shares in Alphabet by 224%.
items.desc_zh: 伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司以 26 亿美元收购了达美航空的股份，并将其在 Alphabet 的股份增加了 224%。

items.title_en: Lululemon takes battle with Chip Wilson public, calls founder 'misguided' and 'outdated'
items.title_zh: Lululemon 与 Chip Wilson 公开交锋，称创始人“被误导”且“过时”
items.desc_en: Lululemon responded publicly to founder Chip Wilson's campaign in a letter to shareholders, where it urged them to vote in its favor at its annual meeting.
items.desc_zh: Lululemon 在致股东的一封信中公开回应了创始人 Chip Wilson 的竞选活动，敦促股东在年度大会上投票支持 Lululemon。

items.title_en: Strike over high fuel prices paralyses transport in Kenya
items.title_zh: 高油价引发的罢工导致肯尼亚交通瘫痪
items.desc_en: Key roads have remained largely empty and some schools have asked students to stay at home.
items.desc_zh: 主要道路基本上仍然空无一人，一些学校要求学生呆在家里。

items.title_en: Regeneron drops after skin cancer treatment misses late-stage trial goal
items.title_zh: 皮肤癌治疗未能达到后期试验目标后，再生元股价下跌
items.desc_en: The drugmaker's fianlimab-cemiplimab ⁠combination ‌did not reach statistical ⁠significance in improving progression-free survival (PFS).
items.desc_zh: 该制药商的 fianlimab-cemiplimab 组合在改善无进展生存期 (PFS) 方面并未达到统计学意义。

items.title_en: At least six Americans exposed to Ebola during DR Congo outbreak
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国爆发期间至少有六名美国人接触埃博拉病毒
items.desc_en: One of the six Americans believed to have been exposed is experiencing symptoms, according to media reports.
items.desc_zh: 据媒体报道，据信接触过病毒的六名美国人中的一名正在出现症状。

items.title_en: Nvidia reports earnings this week. Morgan Stanley is getting more bullish on the chipmaker
items.title_zh: 英伟达本周公布财报。摩根士丹利越来越看好这家芯片制造商
items.desc_en: The investment bank has an overweight rating on the semiconductor name.
items.desc_zh: 该投资银行对半导体名称给予增持评级。

items.title_en: Trump says he should've asked for 'more' of Intel when negotiating stake with CEO
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，在与首席执行官谈判股权时，他应该要求英特尔提供“更多”股份
items.desc_en: The chipmaker's stock has soared since the U.S. equity deal in August gave the government 9.9% of the company.
items.desc_zh: 自从 8 月份的美国股权交易让政府获得该公司 9.9% 的股份以来，这家芯片制造商的股价一路飙升。

items.title_en: Oil jumps as Trump warns 'Clock is Ticking' for Iran, fanning fears of escalation in conflict
items.title_zh: 特朗普警告伊朗“时间紧迫”，油价飙升，引发对冲突升级的担忧
items.desc_en: Trump's warning to Iran over the weekend signals that the impasse between Washington and Tehran over ending the war could deteriorate into resumption of armed conflict.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普周末对伊朗发出的警告表明，华盛顿和德黑兰之间关于结束战争的僵局可能会恶化为武装冲突的恢复。

items.title_en: Israeli forces boarding Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus, activists say
items.title_zh: 活动人士称，以色列军队在塞浦路斯附近登上前往加沙的船队
items.desc_en: Live broadcasts from the Global Sumud flotilla show commandos boarding several boats trying to breach the Gaza maritime blockade.
items.desc_zh: 全球苏姆德舰队的现场直播显示，突击队登上几艘船只，试图突破加沙海上封锁。

items.title_en: Talks to end a strike shutting down the Long Island Rail Road will resume Monday
items.title_zh: 结束长岛铁路罢工的谈判将于周一恢复
items.desc_en: Unions representing rail workers and the Metropolitan Transportation Agency, which runs the railroad, negotiated through much of Sunday and early Monday.
items.desc_zh: 代表铁路工人的工会和运营该铁路的大都会运输局在周日和周一早些时候进行了谈判。

items.title_en: Britain’s prospective next PM tries to placate bond markets after sell-off, gilts steady
items.title_zh: 英国未来的下一任首相试图在抛售后安抚债券市场，英国国债稳定
items.desc_en: The U.K.'s would-be prime minister, Andy Burnham, is being closely watched by bond markets.
items.desc_zh: 英国未来首相安迪·伯纳姆正受到债券市场的密切关注。

items.title_en: Escaped tiger shot by German police after attacking man
items.title_zh: 德国警察袭击男子后逃跑的老虎被射杀
items.desc_en: The tiger escaped a facility owned by local trainer Carmen Zander, also known as Germany's "Tiger Queen", according to local media reports.
items.desc_zh: 据当地媒体报道，这只老虎逃离了当地驯兽师卡门·赞德（Carmen Zander）拥有的设施，卡门·赞德也被称为德国“老虎女王”。

items.title_en: Driver of crashed train tested positive for drugs, Thai police say
items.title_zh: 泰国警方称，失事火车司机毒品检测呈阳性
items.desc_en: The freight train collided with a bus in Bangkok, killing eight people and injuring dozens of others.
items.desc_zh: 货运列车在曼谷与一辆公共汽车相撞，造成八人死亡、数十人受伤。

items.title_en: Treasury yields rise amid global bond rout as inflation fears grip investors
items.title_zh: 由于通胀担忧困扰投资者，全球债券崩盘，国债收益率上升
items.desc_en: Global bond yields rose on Monday as fears of resurgent inflation grip financial markets.
items.desc_zh: 由于对通胀复苏的担忧笼罩金融市场，全球债券收益率周一上涨。

items.title_en: Ryanair has plans for 'armageddon' scenario as CFO warns weaker European carriers may not survive jet fuel crunch
items.title_zh: 瑞安航空已计划应对“世界末日”情景，首席财务官警告实力较弱的欧洲航空公司可能无法在航空燃油紧缩中幸存
items.desc_en: Ryanair said it has plans for an "armageddon situation," amid the jet fuel crisis.
items.desc_zh: 瑞安航空表示，它已计划应对航空燃油危机中的“世界末日”。

items.title_en: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
items.title_zh: 皇家天文台警告说，即时人工智能答案可能会削弱人类智能
items.desc_en: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。

items.title_en: Novo Nordisk’s next obesity battlefront: Winning beyond America
items.title_zh: 诺和诺德的下一个肥胖战线：超越美国
items.desc_en: The weight loss pill had a strong U.S. launch this year, and Novo believes that will be replicated in other markets around the world.
items.desc_zh: 这款减肥药今年在美国大受欢迎，Novo 相信这将在全球其他市场复制。

items.title_en: How Elon Musk and Sam Altman went from besties to bitter rivals
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克和萨姆·奥尔特曼如何从好朋友变成死敌
items.desc_en: In the 11 years since Elon Musk and Sam Altman helped start OpenAI, their once tight bond has unwound, leaving the two billionaires fighting it out in court.
items.desc_zh: 自埃隆·马斯克和萨姆·奥尔特曼帮助创立 OpenAI 以来的 11 年里，他们曾经紧密的关系已经解除，两位亿万富翁在法庭上展开了斗争。

items.title_en: 'Everest Man' and 'Mountain Queen' break own records scaling world's tallest peak
items.title_zh: “珠穆朗玛峰人”和“山峰女王”打破自己攀登世界最高峰的记录
items.desc_en: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.
items.desc_zh: 卡米·丽塔·夏尔巴 (Kami Rita Sherpa) 和拉克帕·夏尔巴 (Lakpa Sherpa) 分别是第 32 次和第 11 次登顶珠穆朗玛峰。

items.title_en: Taiwan will not provoke conflict nor give up sovereignty, says president
items.title_zh: 总统：台湾不会挑起冲突，也不会放弃主权
items.desc_en: Lai Ching-te made his first direct response to Trump and Xi's meeting where they discussed Taiwan independence.
items.desc_zh: 赖清德首次对特朗普和习近平讨论台独问题作出直接回应。

items.title_en: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
items.title_zh: 特习峰会后，白宫大肆宣扬大豆和稀土交易，而中国则讨论削减关税
items.desc_en: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普和中国国家主席习近平上周的会晤达成了新协议，但双方提供了不同的细节。

items.title_en: Moment two fighter jets collide mid-air at US air show
items.title_zh: 美国航展两架战斗机空中相撞瞬间
items.desc_en: Four crew members safely ejected from US Navy jets and are in a stable condition after the collision.
items.desc_zh: 碰撞后，四名机组人员从美国海军飞机上安全弹射，目前情况稳定。

items.title_en: AnyFrame
items.title_zh: AnyFrame
items.desc_en: Sandboxes for your AI agents
items.desc_zh: 适合您的 AI 代理的沙箱

items.title_en: Voiser AI
items.title_zh: Voiser AI
items.desc_en: Human-like AI voiceovers in 140+ languages
items.desc_zh: 140 多种语言的类人 AI 配音

items.title_en: 'This may be the last time you hear my voice': Political executions surge in Iran since start of war
items.title_zh: “这可能是你最后一次听到我的声音”：自战争开始以来伊朗政治处决激增
items.desc_en: Since the US and Israel attacked Iran on  28 February, the UN says it’s verified the execution of at least 32 political prisoners.
items.desc_zh: 自 2 月 28 日美国和以色列袭击伊朗以来，联合国表示已核实至少 32 名政治犯被处决。

items.title_en: Krea 2
items.title_zh: Krea 2
items.desc_en: An image model built for style control and moodboards
items.desc_zh: 为风格控制和情绪板构建的图像模型

items.title_en: M1 by Montage
items.title_zh: M1 by Montage
items.desc_en: Agentic UI that scales on demand
items.desc_zh: 可按需扩展的代理 UI

items.title_en: Polarity
items.title_zh: Polarity
items.desc_en: The Self-Improvement Stack For agents
items.desc_zh: 代理商的自我提升堆栈

items.title_en: Trump warns 'clock is ticking' for Iran as peace progress stalls
items.title_zh: 特朗普警告伊朗“时间紧迫”，和平进程陷入停滞
items.desc_en: Iranian media reports the US has not made concrete concessions in response to Tehran's latest proposals.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗媒体报道称，美国尚未针对德黑兰的最新提议做出具体让步。

items.title_en: UAE reports drone strike near Abu Dhabi nuclear power plant
items.title_zh: 阿联酋报告无人机袭击阿布扎比核电站附近
items.desc_en: The country is investigating the source of the strike, which it says came from its western border.
items.desc_zh: 该国正在调查这次袭击的来源，据称袭击来自其西部边境。

items.title_en: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国的埃博拉疫情有多令人担忧？
items.desc_en: An outbreak in DR Congo has been declared a health emergency, with almost 250 suspected cases reported.
items.desc_zh: 刚果民主共和国的疫情已被宣布为卫生紧急状态，报告了近 250 例疑似病例。

items.title_en: Why your 'fixed' mortgage payment keeps going up
items.title_zh: 为什么你的“固定”抵押贷款付款不断增加
items.desc_en: Rising property taxes and surging homeowners insurance costs are pushing up the amount that homeowners must pay monthly alongside their mortgage.
items.desc_zh: 不断上涨的财产税和飙升的房主保险费用正在推高房主每月必须支付的抵押贷款金额。

items.title_en: Moody
items.title_zh: Moody
items.desc_en: Your Mac wallpaper that listens to your music & weather
items.desc_zh: 聆听音乐和天气的 Mac 壁纸

items.title_en: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯称乌克兰大规模无人机袭击莫斯科地区造成三人死亡
items.desc_en: In Ukraine, local officials report eight injured in overnight Russian drone strikes and shelling.
items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰，当地官员报告称，俄罗斯无人机夜间袭击和炮击造成八人受伤。

items.title_en: SizzleAir
items.title_zh: SizzleAir
items.desc_en: Thermal assistant for fanless MacBook Airs
items.desc_zh: 无风扇 MacBook Air 的散热助手

items.title_en: ReactVision Studio
items.title_zh: ReactVision Studio
items.desc_en: Build AR/VR Apps in React Native + ship directly to devices
items.desc_zh: 在 React Native 中构建 AR/VR 应用程序 + 直接发送到设备

items.title_en: Searchad.ai
items.title_zh: Searchad.ai
items.desc_en: Run Apple Search Ads by Chatting with AI
items.desc_zh: 通过与 AI 聊天来投放 Apple Search Ads

items.title_en: Man drives car into pedestrians in Italy, injuring eight
items.title_zh: 意大利一男子驾车冲撞行人致八人受伤
items.desc_en: Seven people were injured, two seriously, before passers-by gave chase and stopped the man.
items.desc_zh: 七人受伤，其中两人伤势严重，随后路人追赶并阻止了该男子。

items.title_en: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
items.title_zh: 无论好坏，投资者都在经历特朗普的股市。这就是为什么
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统被认为是股市的终极总统，他见证了股市的扩张，创下历史新高，也见证了股市的大幅下跌。

items.title_en: pixserp
items.title_zh: pixserp
items.desc_en: Your LLM on the live web. One endpoint, ten answer shapes.
items.desc_zh: 您在实时网络上的法学硕士。一个端点，十个答案形状。

items.title_en: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.title_en: LobeHub
items.title_zh: LobeHub
items.desc_en: Your Chief Agent Operator for multi-agent work
items.desc_zh: 您的多代理工作首席代理操作员

items.title_en: QuickRight
items.title_zh: QuickRight
items.desc_en: The missing right-click features for macOS Finder
items.desc_zh: macOS Finder 缺少右键单击功能

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。

items.title_en: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi 老板警告说，人工智能可能会让人们失业并损害经济
items.desc_en: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.
items.desc_zh: 埃本·厄普顿 (Eben Upton) 对人工智能将在未来几年摧毁大量计算角色的说法提出警告。

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。

items.title_en: Agentspan
items.title_zh: Agentspan
items.desc_en: Open-source runtime for durable AI agents
items.desc_zh: 持久人工智能代理的开源运行时

items.title_en: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
items.title_zh: 英国税务海关总署将使用英国科技公司的人工智能来发现欺诈和纳税申报错误
items.desc_en: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.
items.desc_zh: 金融数据平台 Quantexa 赢得了价值 1.75 亿英镑的合同，以发现欺诈和纳税申报错误。

items.title_en: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 与其人工智能聊天机器人推出完全私密的“隐身”对话
items.desc_en: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.desc_zh: 一位网络安全专家表示，如果出现问题，删除聊天记录可能会导致缺乏责任感。

items.title_en: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
items.title_zh: 自杀论坛因未屏蔽英国用户而被罚款 95 万英镑
items.desc_en: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，该论坛在保护英国用户方面做得不够，但批评者指责 Ofcom 行动太慢。

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.title_en: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
items.title_zh: 向寻求虐待儿童材料的人们发出了超过 7000 万条警告
items.desc_en: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.
items.desc_zh: 这些消息强调人们在网上搜索的内容是非法的，并引导他们寻求帮助。

items.title_en: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
items.title_zh: 智能眼镜“侵犯隐私”——Meta 的销量比以往任何时候都好
items.desc_en: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.
items.desc_zh: 尽管隐私问题日益严重，但最大的科技公司仍将销售数百万副智能眼镜。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Crumbling roads and other hazards - can AI make our streets safer?
items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？

items.title_en: Sam Altman: Elon Musk wanted control of OpenAI even after death
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼：埃隆·马斯克死后仍想控制 OpenAI
items.desc_en: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.
items.desc_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼表示，埃隆·马斯克曾多次尝试完全控制 OpenAI，目前他正在起诉 OpenAI。

items.title_en: Files SDK
items.title_zh: Files SDK
items.desc_en: A unified storage SDK for object and blob backends
items.desc_zh: 适用于对象和 blob 后端的统一存储 SDK

items.title_en: Shadow
items.title_zh: Shadow
items.desc_en: AI computer screen and voice control with custom automation
